features.name: Proof Platform
features.description: Repository verification, scoring, verdicts, reports, dashboards, and PR evidence.

features.name: Project Knowledge Graph
features.description: Persistent deterministic code truth, dependencies, tests, features, routes, schemas, and freshness.

features.name: Context Compiler
features.description: Task-specific role-aware context packs bounded by a token budget.

features.name: Sandbox and Security
features.description: Isolated command execution, policy checks, dependency analysis, and secret scanning.
